description: DRAFT, non-normative — SUPERSEDED (V5, RUN-ATTEST-04): replaced by ing.croft.attest.treeHead. Kept visible per supersede-never-delete doc practice; do not implement. Original text: DRAFT, non-normative (RUN-ATTEST-03 B.2). One closed epoch of the issuer's public lineage (crate: EpochRecord): an UNORDERED set of blinded commitments H(credential-id ∥ fresh salt) — never persona identifiers (T-PA1.3) — canonicalized byte-ascending so within an epoch mint adjacency does not exist (T-PA1.4). The epoch number and declared total are the ONLY numerics (the totals-only rule T-PA3.3 audits); nothing per-member is representable. The repo commit signature covers the record, replacing the crate's detached epoch signature.

epochNo.description: Contiguous from 1; a gap fails the lineage audit (T-PA6.2).

commitments.description: Byte-ascending canonical order of an unordered set — computed from commitment values alone, never from mint order.

declaredTotal.description: Must equal the commitment count (audit: TotalMismatch otherwise). A total, never a partition.
